Compute the cyclomatic complexity of a function body

Source: R/parser.R
cyclomatic_complexity.Rd

Counts decision points (if, for, while, repeat, &&, ||, case_when-style nested ifelse, and each switch() branch) plus one, the standard McCabe formulation.

Usage

cyclomatic_complexity(fn_expr)

Arguments

fn_expr

A function expression (the value returned in the expr field of top_level_functions() entries).

Value

Integer scalar complexity score.

On this page
